strategyRegistry.label: Balanced (recommended)
strategyRegistry.description: Best overall load quality; tidy rows, wheel-well aware.

strategyRegistry.label: Floor first (no stacking)
strategyRegistry.description: Single layer only — nothing stacked; extra items stage.

strategyRegistry.label: Stack priority
strategyRegistry.description: Stacks earlier to use vertical space.

strategyRegistry.label: Max Capacity
strategyRegistry.description: Physical-fit estimate; handling rules may be relaxed. Not a transport recommendation.

strategyRegistry.label: Constrained space first
strategyRegistry.description: Fills narrow Wheel Wells spaces before open floor.
